curve.title: curve
curve.description: Curve of the ECDSA key. Default is P-256.

bits.title: bits
bits.description: Bit size of the RSA key. Default is 2048 bits.

hasher.title: hasher
hasher.description: Signing algorithm used. Default is SHA256.

id.title: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the key.

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description: The timestamp of the key creation.

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description: The timestamp of the last change to the key (e.g. creation, activation, deactivation).
